name: Hogan's Golf Garage
about: Hogan's Golf Garage is a premium indoor golf training facility located in Denver, Colorado, featuring advanced TrackMan 4 technology for year-round play and practice. The venue is centered around high-performance golf simulation with access to a library of famous courses and detailed shot data analysis. Pricing is currently membership-only, with no walk-ins or tee time bookings available for non-members. The facility is designed for serious golfers looking to improve their game with professional-grade technology and tools.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan 4 dual radar technology providing 26 shot parameters in real-time
Access to world-famous courses including St. Andrews Links and Royal Portrush
Detailed club and ball tracking for precise swing analysis and improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, appears to be BYO-friendly
No alcohol service mentioned, appears to be BYO-friendly

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar technology with professional-grade accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is allowed, and food can likely be brought as well.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes can be done in a 3-hour window as part of membership time allocation.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility appears to be focused on serious golf practice and training, not family or kid-friendly activities.
